lenient.rationale_for_score: The summary suffers from severe fluency issues due to poor grammar and awkward phrasing (e.g., 'the series of `` original '' and `` contemporary '' will be the new version' is confusing and unidiomatic). While it captures the main facts consistently with the text, the lack of clarity significantly impacts readability. It is leniently scored above 1 because it avoids hallucinations and covers key points, but the quality is poor.
